title: Dark Factory: OpenClaw Ships Faster Than You Can Read the Diff — Vincent Koc, OpenClaw
summary: Vincent Koc describes OpenClaw's extreme code generation velocity of 3,000 commits in a day using 60 to 70 parallel AI agents. The talk covers managing parallel coding sessions organized by type and emphasizes the importance of interpreting agent reasoning tokens to detect failures, framing 2026 as focused on efficient token use rather than token maximization.
